breaking.title: Several Israeli strikes hit south Lebanon
breaking.summary: Lebanon's Health Ministry raised the death toll in Israeli attacks since the war broke out to 3826, as rescuers pull more bodies from the rubble

breaking.title: UK investigating reports Russian warship fired warning shots near yacht in English Channel
breaking.summary: The retired couple tell BBC Newsnight they tried to show the warship they had changed course in the English Channel before the shots were fired.

breaking.title: Search for six-year-old Ebola patient after armed men storm DR Congo hospital
breaking.summary: Health facilities have come under attack during the current outbreak as a result of misinformation and fear.

breaking.title: Iran's Missiles Can Reach London, Delhi And US: Israel Minister To NDTV
breaking.summary: Haskel said Israel took military action only in response to attacks by Iran or Hezbollah.

breaking.title: Strike at paper leak mafia, not students: Rahul Gandhi to PM Modi on Telegram curbs
breaking.summary: Telegram has stopped working for existing users in India after the Centre temporarily restricted access to the messaging app ahead of the June 21 NEET-UG re-examination

breaking.title: Speaker did not conduct ‘meaningful inquiry’ before accepting resignations of four MLAs: AIADMK whip tells Madras High Court
breaking.summary: He says the submission of the first three resignations at 2.30 p.m. and their acceptance at 3.55 p.m. demonstrate a sham of compliance with constitutional procedures

breaking.title: Telangana govt intensifies efforts to mobilise resources for  Rythu Bharosa kharif installment amid financial challenges
breaking.summary: Govt to credit ₹6,000 an acre to into accounts of 67 lakh farmers. Telangana government is however likely to face tough time in raising finances as the revenue receipts during the first couple of months are not up to the expectations

breaking.title: White Paper addresses adverse impact of ‘revenue collapse’ on people of Tamil Nadu
breaking.summary: The White Paper observed “the inter-generational transfer—from today’s beneficiaries of government services to tomorrow’s taxpayers who will service the resulting debt—is the defining fiscal inequity of the period under review.”
